title: Product Visual QA
description: Annotate product images with bounding boxes, attribute labels, and natural-language question-answer pairs. Data trains multi-modal models for visual search, product understanding, and conversational commerce across e-commerce platforms.

tasks.title: Upload product image
tasks.description: Photograph a consumer product (electronics, clothing, food, furniture) on a clean background. Multiple angles encouraged.

tasks.title: Bbox + attribute + QA annotation
tasks.description: Draw bounding boxes around each product region, label attributes (color, material, size, brand), write 3 question-answer pairs that require visual understanding.

tasks.title: Annotation quality check
tasks.description: Bbox IoU against auto-detection, attribute consistency, QA groundedness score.
